Localization.Description: Remote creation or update of a Windows task using the built-in utility "schtasks" is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Remote creation or update of a task on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} using the built-in utility "schtasks" is detected
Remote creation or update of a task on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} using the built-in utility "schtasks" is detected
